# Release title

Minor: Event system and API improvements

---

## Changelog

## [1.1.0] - 2026-05-11

### Added

- EventEmitter-based event system for `Game` class using `eventemitter3`
- New game events: `PLAYER_MOVE` and `RESET`
- Index-based board access methods `savePlayerMove(index)`, `isFieldSelectedByIndex(index)` (Game) and `getFieldByIndex(index)`, `setFieldByIndex(index, symbol)` (Board)
- `board` getter property for direct board state access

### Changed

- `savePlayerSelection(field)` and `isFieldSelected(field)` are now deprecated in favor of index-based methods
- `getBoard()` method is now deprecated; use the `board` getter instead

### Docs

- Updated TypeScript types to reflect new API additions

[1.1.0]: https://github.com/TenGosc007/t3core/compare/v1.0.3...v1.1.0
